title: Provenance event
description: One line of a per-process JSON Lines provenance log. The log is append-only: events are never edited or deleted, corrections are new events. Each event carries the sha256 of the previous line, forming a verifiable chain.

prev_hash.description: sha256 hex digest of the previous line's exact bytes; null for seq 1.

event.description: Event vocabulary is extensible; additions are non-breaking.
